ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' OCR-ed as '試験にはつしが出る！' — same recurring stylized katakana misread of 'コレ' as hiragana 'つし'.

バスタブ曲線 graph image (showing 初期故障期, 偶発故障期, 摩耗故障期 on x-axis and 故障率 on y-axis) captured as image placeholder; axis labels and curve-region names are not in OCR text. The surrounding prose describes the curve adequately, so impact is low.

reviewer_notes: Content page covering composite system reliability calculation, serial/parallel system formulas, and the bathtub curve. All prose text and the four exam-tip bullet formulas are accurately transcribed. The bathtub curve diagram's axis labels are missing (image placeholder) but the text around it explains the concept. Recurring 'コレ→つし' wrong_char is medium severity. Label 'content' is correct.
